---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for SolverOS
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Be specific. "Make SolverOS better" doesn't help. "I want to track recurring tasks across projects but the current `objetivos.md` doesn't support frequency" does. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you'd like to see implemented. Describe the user-facing behavior, not the implementation. -->

## Real use case

<!-- A concrete situation where you'd use this. The more specific, the better. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What workarounds you've tried. Why they don't work for you. -->

## Would this fit Core or a Stack?

<!-- SolverOS separates generic capabilities (Core) from specialized ones (Stacks). Where does your idea fit? -->

- [ ] Core (generic, useful to all users)
- [ ] Stack: Empresa (enterprise PMO)
- [ ] Stack: Ecommerce
- [ ] Stack: Other (specify): _________
- [ ] Not sure

## Are you willing to help build it?

<!-- No is fine. Yes is welcomed. -->

- [ ] I can write code for this
- [ ] I can help design / spec it
- [ ] I can help test it
- [ ] I'm just suggesting; happy to wait
